programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Kiss
programme.desc: An interior designer and her assistant compete for the affections of a socialite home for the holidays.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Ride to the Rescue
programme.desc: A Sacramento law student is convicted after a brutal home invasion and murder. Her cause seems lost until Joyce Ride, mother of Sally Ride, becomes intrigued with the case.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murdered Babysitter
programme.desc: A babysitter is found brutally murdered in Santa Ana, California, with five young children left in the home unscathed. The parents are quick to point to a local transient who had previously burglarized the house.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Rough Justice in the Big Easy
programme.desc: A businessman is shot dead during a mugging in New Orleans. Cops pursue a criminal named John Thompson and secure his conviction on the charges. Two successful lawyers agree to represent him and soon discover prosecutors weren't playing by the rules.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Love Kills
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Stacey Stites' body is found half-naked by the side of the road, her fiancé, police officer Jimmy Fennell, is cleared as a suspect.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Mississippi Mother
programme.desc: Sabrina Butler, a 17-year old woman, arrives at a Mississippi hospital with her baby dead on arrival. Nurses and doctors suspect foul play, and Sabrina cannot give straight answers about what happened to her baby.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Games
programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins America
programme.desc: Adam lets his freedom flag fly by examining why America doesn’t have higher rates of social mobility. He then uncovers the flaws within the constitution and examines the country’s progression and regression.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out
programme.desc: Adam and Emily prepare for a big night out by revealing the marketing ploy that led to women shaving and the fashion agendas that created pockets. Then, the two friends pour back the truth on alcohol consumption.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ice Cubed

programme.title: The King of Queens: Catching Hell

programme.title: The King of Queens: Slippery Slope

programme.title: The King of Queens: Buy Curious

programme.title: The King of Queens: Vocal Discord
programme.desc: In an effort to save money, Doug and Carrie ask their neighbour Glenn for counselling since he happens to be a marriage counsellor. Glenn agrees to help out only to have his problem-solving techniques backfire, causing their arguments to get worse.

programme.desc: Carrie discovers that Doug lied to her about getting a job at IPS ten years ago.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Back Road Bait

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Small Town Troubles
programme.desc: Game wardens are ready for springtime in Texas. Wardens investigate a video of an illegal hunter. A concerned citizen reports a hunter on his property. A fisherman is illegally catching oysters. A game warden smells something fishy going on.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In Hot Water
programme.desc: Dockery responds to a call about an alligator found near a residential area. The game wardens find blood in a hunter's car after a hunter claimed he didn't shoot anything. Boone follows up on a call about five racoons making their way into someone's home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trashed
programme.desc: Across Texas, game wardens work day and night to enforce the law. In East Texas, a young woman is served an arrest warrant. A fisherman has no fishing license but plenty of outstanding warrants. Outside Austin, someone illegally dumps a pile of trash.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Follow wildlife adventurer and biologist Forrest Galante as explores the real stories behind animals thought to be gone forever and tries to prove their existence so he can protect them and help them thrive again.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Saving the Herd
programme.desc: Game warden Eddins assists the local police with an animal cruelty case. Game warden Richards responds to a trespassing dispute, and Game warden Roraback relocates a snapping turtle. On the coast, Game warden Bailey cracks down on fishermen.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Submerged
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens are all hands on deck after a massive flash flood. Game Wardens rush to a gas station that could explode. A patrol through the Rio Grande leads to an unexpected encounter. Game Wardens investigate an illegally killed hawk.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kitten Dolls
programme.desc: Three litters of kittens grow from helpless furballs to rambunctious young kittens in this epic story.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Fifi's Ruining My Love Life

programme.title: The Vet Life: The Dog Ate My Shorts
programme.desc: Dr. Blue must figure out what's wrong with Niko, a lethargic dog that may have eaten his mom's shorts. Dr. Lavigne operates on a husky with a torn ligament and Dr. Ross faces an emergency with his own family pet. The vets treat Cy-Fair to a crawfish boil.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: The Cutest Yak in Colorado
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff treats a couple's cherished bloodhound puppy that won't eat. Dr. Petra races to save a cat after he's swallowed a handful of hair ties. And Dr. Jeff and Hector head out to a veteran's ranch to help a baby therapy yak.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Great Gaur Move
programme.desc: Keepers introduce three gaur, a large, skittish species of cattle, to the rest of the herd. A sickly Sambar fawn is rushed to the health center. Plus, the bird department excitedly prepares for the arrival of great hornbills.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Adventures of Porcupine Dating
programme.desc: Rhino Kifaru is attempting to mate, despite his arthritic knees; tapir Jenny falls ill, and widowed porcupine Roxy meets a new mate.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Village of Wolves
programme.desc: Villalobos is tested like never before when Tia and her crew are called upon to rescue a pack of wolf-dog hybrids abandoned by a backyard breeder. With law enforcement threatening to kill the dogs, the pressure is higher than ever.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Left for Dead
programme.desc: Tia races to rescue an emaciated puppy chained to an abandoned home. A couple visits VRC in hope of finding a younger sibling for their dog. And a Good Samaritan needs help rescuing a stray mama dog still bleeding three weeks after giving birth.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Everything Is Hungry
programme.desc: Winter is here and the time for preparation is over. Bob deals with the ramifications of crashing his plane. To begin trapping, Heimo must find a way to cross a newly frozen river. Ray and his daughters set out to catch much needed meat.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Last Sunset
programme.desc: The cost of life hundreds of miles from civilization is front and center. Tyler and Ashley trek 15 miles to a lake cabin to run their dog team and search for food. Bob leaves home to see his daughter and assess the damage of his crashed plane.

programme.title: Movie: South Central
programme.desc: A veteran gang member is determined to spare his son from the ravages of gang life.

programme.title: Martin: Green Card
programme.desc: Pam agrees to marry the building superintendent when he's threatened with deportation, but her help comes at a price.

programme.title: Martin: You're All I Need
programme.desc: When Martin flirts with a producer's wife, Gina becomes jealous and fights back.

programme.title: Martin: Kicked to the Curb

programme.title: Girlfriends: The Fallout

programme.desc: Denise is apprehensive about a visit from her grandfather, as she fears she cannot live up to his expectations. Jaleesa and Maggie ask Denise to take part in a traditional homecoming prank by stealing the head of the rival mascot's bear costume.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A Veteran Home Makeover

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Three
programme.desc: In this hour of Most Terrifying Places in America, we keep crisscrossing the country to tour even more paranormal hotspots. We visit a castle outside of Seattle that is haunted by a suicidal monk, and an early American Inn near Boston.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Two
programme.desc: Dine with ghosts then party with the paranormal at a haunted nightclub. Head underground in Portland where unsuspecting folks were held captive and then hit up a haunted mansion and tattoo parlor.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Unnatural World

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Cursed Towns

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Restless Dead
programme.desc: From a former Victorian-era asylum where victims were experimented on to a remote Nebraska outpost where a scorned woman killed her unfaithful husband, we explore the gravest of locations where the dead never sleep.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Haunted Road Trips

programme.title: Married to Medicine: Resuscitated Friendships

programme.title: Married to Medicine: Ballin' on a Budget

programme.desc: Toya shocks the ladies with her idea of an art class. Heavenly decides not to tell Damon about Toya's explicit birthday party. While Simone and Cecil give the boys a safe sex talk, Jackie does some sexual research for an exciting new project.

programme.title: Below Deck: I Don't Date, I Mate
programme.desc: In spite of being a man down with Don's departure, Eddie and the rest of the deckhands feel relieved and stronger than ever. When guest Dean suggests a crew dive contest, the Eros team willing obliges and Rocky breaks out her beloved mermaid tail.

programme.title: Below Deck: I'm Ironing the Captain's Shorts

programme.title: Below Deck: Storm's a Comin'

programme.title: Below Deck: Fire!

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries in the Alien Desert
Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the Holy Land's greatest mysteries, but new discoveries might finally reveal the hidden meaning behind the strange texts, and as experts get closer to unmasking their author, they find clues of an ancient apocalypse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Evil Twin
programme.desc: The lost city of Baiae was the Las Vegas of the ancient world, until a mysterious calamity caused it to sink into the sea. New discoveries reveal the secrets of this sin city that, like Pompeii, some experts believe was destroyed by a supervolcano.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Mystery of the Giants
programme.desc: Discover why so many of our cultures refer to giants and if they were myths or could have actually walked the earth. See the tombs and skeletons discovered in Sardinia, where evidence of giants may have been found.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasures of Petra
programme.desc: It is one of the great wonders of the ancient world, but there is little information on who built the magnificent city of Petra in Jordan and why. See what treasure remains buried there and the dark secrets that remain in this mysterious place.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Great Pyramid: The Lost Treasure
programme.desc: The recent discovery of an ancient Egyptian treasure offers new clues that could finally reveal how the Great Pyramid was built.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Ghosts of the Great Pyramid
programme.desc: Experts use a long-lost relic to bring the workers who built the Great Pyramid back to life, reshaping everything we know about ancient Egypt and its treasures.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Atlantis: The New Treasures
programme.desc: After experts discover an ancient lost city off the coast of Egypt, the race to unearth its priceless relics and bring this mysterious sunken world back to life begins, revealing the doomsday event that caused it to sink into the sea.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Stonehenge: The Forbidden History
programme.desc: Experts use the latest technology to reveal how a primitive civilization built one of the world's greatest structures, Stonehenge.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic
programme.desc: A strange, alien artifact discovered in the ruins of an ancient Greek shipwreck holds the secrets of a technology thousands of years ahead of its time. Now experts are using cutting-edge science to reveal what this mysterious device was used for.

programme.title: Our Future in Space
programme.desc: Brian Cox travels the world searching for new frontiers of space flight.

programme.title: Secrets of Space and Time
programme.desc: Brian Cox travels the world in an attempt to understand our true place in space and time.

programme.title: Are We Alone?
programme.desc: Go inside the story of human origins and of our expansion across the face of the planet and ultimately into space with a bold new theory. Brian Cox takes a journey that links the evolution of our ancestors' brain size to changes in the Earth's orbit.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Universe's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: A new breed of explorers is risking their careers, and even their lives, to lead humanity to worlds we have never seen. From the beginning of our Solar System to the evolution of the Universe, these heroes are tackling the mysteries of life itself.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Finding Alien Moons
programme.desc: New discoveries are helping experts in their search for the first alien moon outside our solar system, which could be Earth-like worlds with the potential for life. So far, they haven't found any, but twenty-first century methods might change everything.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: New Race to the Moon
programme.desc: New discoveries show that the Moon could be our next home for human life.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of the Juno Mission
programme.desc: NASA's Juno mission is the closest we've ever explored Jupiter, and its incredible images reveal the gas giant's deepest secrets and how this deadly world helped create our solar system.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Just Wanted My Burger
programme.desc: The A.T.T. F is on the prowl in Newark, New Jersey and they have plenty to keep them busy. First they get a work out when a perp takes off running, later they recover a stolen tractor trailer and a stolen car at a drive-thru window.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: They're Hitting the Highway
programme.desc: A stolen vehicle is found abandoned, rolling backwards down the street.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Last Dance
programme.desc: Two armed and masked intruders barge into a family home demanding money, and threaten to kill the children. The police search for one of the suspects - an exotic dancer.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Detectives track a fugitive wanted for the second-degree rape of a young woman barely out of high school.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: One to Go
programme.desc: Federal authorities in Puerto Rico completed a major drug offensive against a notorious gang with 71 people facing indictment, but they failed to capture one of the alleged leaders.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: The Bronx Boys
programme.desc: Two friends from the South Bronx go on a crime spree that is increasingly more violent with each offence.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Don't Think I Can Make It in Jail
programme.desc: The Task Force acquires a new piece of equipment and finds it to be very helpful. Later, the A.T.T.F helps the Newark police catch an armed robbery vehicle.

programme.desc: An immigrant accused of viciously murdering his own family may be hiding out in Manhattan's Chinatown neighbourhood.

programme.desc: Newark police catch a suspect red-handed, but back at the precinct, the suspect escapes from the interrogation room. After 'Houdini' eludes several attempts to capture him over the next two months, the Fugitive Task Force takes over.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Just One Step Behind
programme.desc: Detectives scour the streets to find people who are willing to provide information on a fugitive's whereabouts.

programme.desc: Family bonds and family struggles take center stage when a man approaches Robb and Bethany and asks them to help find his missing daughter whom he fears is dead. The ROC squad set up a high-profile sting to capture a group of thieves preying on Tampa.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Sergeant Joe McHale and his tactical team are called in to coax an unstable man out of his hotel room after he stabs a hotel employee. But when the man turns the knife on himself, McHale and his squad must act quickly to save a life.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Sergeant Chip Huth and his team head out to serve a drug warrant on an alleged mid-level drug dealer. When the warrant takes turns into a lead-slinging barricade, the SWAT team is left dodging bullets and running for cover.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Officer Tim Davis' morning run is interrupted by a barricaded gunman who has taken two women hostages, his sister and his girlfriend. Then the already nerve-racking domestic dispute grows even more tense when gunshots ring out inside the home.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: SWAT team negotiator Jake Byas faces the toughest challenge of his career: dealing with an armed murder suspect barricaded on a ledge who's threatening to kill himself and anyone who tries to get him down; another team surrounds the home of a drug dealer.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Memorial Day weekend erupts when SWAT is called in to subdue a home intruder, whose startling method of entry leaves the team scratching their heads. An alleged heroin dealer is scoped out by an officer who's on a mission to put him out of business.

programme.title: Shattered: Driftwood Killer
programme.desc: 1994. New Castle, DE. A deadly fire claims what appears to be an innocent victim, leaving a woman shaken by her sister's death... a detective learns the fire is not an accident - but a murder... and a man discovers the true nature of his brother.

programme.title: Shattered: The Darkside
programme.desc: Brandi McClain falls in love with a handsome and famous skateboarder known as 'Gator.' Though Gator claims to find God with the help of a well-meaning preacher, no one knows that his dark side lurks dangerously close to the surface.

programme.title: Shattered: The Bodies Out Back
programme.desc: 1986. A 13-year-old girl escapes her captors, then lives in fear they'll return to kill her. A young boy learns his father's fate and realizes his nightmares are memories, and a prison break leads a rookie cop on the hunt for two ruthless murderers.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: The Sheriff's Son
programme.desc: When an Arkansas outdoorsman disappears, authorities wade through a series of accusations and rumors in their hunt for the missing man. As they zero in on a suspect and the body count rises, detectives rush to capture the killer before it's too late.

programme.title: American Monster: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: A look at killers who are hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: American Monster: Smoke Gets in Your Eyes
programme.desc: A look at killers who are hiding in plain sight.

programme.desc: The daughter of one of America's most notorious killers gives an exclusive interview, taking us on a journey into the eyes of a cold-blooded monster. Never-before-seen footage reveals the devastating double life of a murderer and his horrific crimes.

programme.title: Diabolical: Til' Death Do We Part
programme.desc: Lyle and Carol Kopenskey are high school sweethearts who marry after graduation. The couple that other couples want to be like. But after 40 years of marital bliss, an old friend returns to the fold and jealousies turn passions into cold blooded murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Accident Waiting to Happen
programme.desc: Rainey Morin is a single mom who's finally found her soulmate. Robert Kowalski treats Rainey like a queen and her kids like gold, but beneath his bright veneer is a dark history threatening to wreak havoc.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Nowhere to Run
programme.desc: Two girls take a trip to the mall and never come home. Less than 24 hours later they are found shot to death in a desolate field. An investigation aims to resolve if they were killed by someone they knew or had been victims of a notorious serial killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Cloud Of Darkness
programme.desc: A college student disappears in broad daylight after an afternoon of sunbathing at a busy lake. The mystery deepens when her wallet is found along with the personal items of the victim of another violent crime.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Rocky Mountain Mystery
programme.desc: When a young woman disappears on a cold night in Breckenridge Colorado, one of the state's darkest mysteries begins.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery on Sunrise Drive
programme.desc: A successful real estate developer is killed with a car bomb, a mystery that takes nearly two decades to solve.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery on Sunrise Drive
programme.desc: A successful real estate developer is killed with a car bomb, a mystery that takes nearly two decades to solve.

programme.title: Dateline: A Killing in Cottonwood
programme.desc: Karen and Mark Duenas had a special marriage. Teenage sweethearts, the couple managed to keep the romance alive even after raising five boys together. Then a perfectly normal night ended in murder, a tragedy that would test the bonds of family.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: My House, My Revenge
programme.desc: A couple moves to an idyllic California beach town and hits it off with their new neighbors. The wives are particularly friendly, until one of them descends into drugs and madness, terrorizing and turning murderous intent upon the other.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Head in the Oven
programme.desc: Two neighbouring bachelors start out as friends. Harmless banter turns into threats eventually igniting an escalating war. The violence ends with a murder so shocking it is almost beyond belief.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Family Values
programme.desc: A woman who still lives in her family home befriends her new neighbours, only to be plunged into a nightmare of threats, violence and betrayal. When her brother steps up to protect her, blood will be spilled and lives forever shattered.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Lies, Lawns & Murder
programme.desc: In North Carolina, a retired Vietnam veteran sells off a piece of his land to a young family. No one can predict the modern day Hatfield McCoy neighbor feud that will ensue and the midnight shootout that will end it.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Slaying Season
programme.desc: When a single mother of three misses a routine bank run with her sister, panic begins to spread among the family. The family's nightmare becomes a reality when a passerby finds the beloved petite woman brutally assaulted, nude, and frozen in an alley.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Somali Pirate Takedown: The Real Story
programme.desc: Find out the real story behind the Navy SEAL kill shots that finally freed Captain Richard Phillips.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Somali Pirate Takedown: The Real Story
programme.desc: Find out the real story behind the Navy SEAL kill shots that finally freed Captain Richard Phillips.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Build It Bigger: Navy Amphibious Warship
programme.desc: The LPD17 is a new class of amphibious assault ship for the US Navy that can launch over 700 Marines and equipment on helicopters and hovercrafts. Join host Danny Forster as we explore the innovative 700-foot long and 25,000-ton stealth vessel.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.desc: A showcase of gourmet food for holiday entertaining or for gift giving.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Honey Bucket
programme.desc: Nick races to finish his cabin before his mom visits again. Bears are still a threat, so Nick makes sure the electric fence is working. Nick and Kent design and build a "honey bucket," also known as an Alaskan toilet.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Home Stretch
programme.desc: All the builders are in the home stretch in Alaska as they try to finish their cabins. Jere and Ben install interior and exterior siding. Nick's roof is dried in, so he turns to finishing the sleeping loft.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Grand Finale
programme.desc: Nick's dad, Paul, returns to help put the finishing touches on the cabin. Brannon's team builds countertops and railings for the cabin, and his client arrives. Jere and Ben put in hard work finishing the new Sea Otter Sound Lodge.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A New World of Challenges
programme.desc: Three news teams begin their projects and rookie builders Matt and Amy Hill quickly realize building in snow is more complicated than they planned. Mike and Dan Owens mill their own lumber while Jackie hires professionals to dig her foundation.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Snowball Effect
programme.desc: At Jackie's slippery build site, the team works to finish the subfloor and start raising walls, but rain and mud hinder them at every step. Meanwhile, the Hills are forced to dig their supplies out of three feet of snow.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Going Vertical
programme.desc: Chappie Cook's team runs into bears and sinking boats while hauling scaffolding materials. Jeff Erickson carefully begins to construct his slippery roof and Chris Sewell works tirelessly to install all the timber walls of his cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain Gear Is Going On
programme.desc: Chappie's team struggles to lift 600-pound rafters onto the cabin's roof. Then, Chris works on drying in his cabin while Jeff begins installing his cabin's windows.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: A couple reaches a standstill during demolition, so David and Michelle come to the rescue to save their remodel.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Ohana New Kitchen
programme.desc: Michelle and David Jaime rearrange a whole house for a growing family in need of a new kitchen, dining room and master bedroom.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Halfway House
programme.desc: Michelle and David are challenged to fix a previous remodel that has left half of a home stuck in the 1980s.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Hawaiian Shirt Renovation
programme.desc: Daniel, Kahina and their new baby live in a charming house built in 1931, but the miniscule master closet is being overrun by Daniel's Hawaiian shirt collection.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: A Touch of Hawaii
programme.desc: A couple with an unfinished basement apartment that they would like to rent out, call in David and Michelle Jaime to finish off the work. The siblings bring in natural wood tones and durable kitchen finishes, adding their signature Hawaiian touch.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: David and Michelle Jaime take on a whale of a remodel, updating the kitchen, living room and master suite in a home that has been in their client's family for generations.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: House on a Hill
programme.desc: A young family calls on David and Michelle Jaime to update their home that was built in the 1950s. The interior and exterior project involves opening up the floor plan of the kitchen and living room.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Third-Generation Renovation
programme.desc: David and Michelle Jaime take on Kimo and Jodie's third-generation house, which was built by Jodie's grandparents in the 1950s.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: In Over Their Head
programme.desc: A couple that gets in way over their heads with a DIY renovation call in David and Michelle Jaime to help tackle the job.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Breezeblock Build
programme.desc: A family that has lived all over the world hires David and Michelle Jaime to make their home feel truly Hawaiian.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Burgers and Bombs
programme.desc: Start the season off right with whacky takes on some fairground classics, with The Waffle Burger and the Donut Philly Cheesesteak. 'Zanado Fries and a S'mores Cobbler round off the day.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cowboys and Cakes
programme.desc: Noah joins the crowd of the Fort Worth Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas to experience the meaty Cowboy Burrito and the Texas Juicy Lucy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Some Like It Popped
programme.desc: Noah hits the Big Butler Fair in Prospect, PA., where he tears into the Conevore, filled to the brim with smoked brisket, pork and chicken.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: When Harry Met Salad
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is the Wayne County Fair in Richmond, Ind., where he takes a stroll with the Walking BBQ, feels the groove of the King with a bacon PB&J quesadilla, goes healthy-ish with a deep fried salad.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dawn of the Bread
programme.desc: Noah Cappe cruises up the west coast, starting at the Columbia County Fair in St. Helens, Ore. First up is a traditional Indian fry bread stuffed with some non-traditional ingredients, then Noah dives into the coastal fusion of the great Pacific pita.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts at the Delaware State Fair, where he'll eat the very stately Delaware Dog, a hot dog loaded with scrapple. Then, he'll try to tackle the funnel cake-filled Frankenfunnel Burger and the octopus-loaded Octotaco.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Pizza Goes Healthy
programme.desc: Tia Mowry starts her day at one of her favorite neighborhood pizza places, where she orders up two amazing pizzas.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: It's All Relative
programme.desc: Tia's aunt Blondie and cousin Jerome come over to share family stories while Tia and Cory cook up some impressive Caribbean-inspired dishes. Tia and Cory make a family secret curry chicken and potatoes as well as seafood paella.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Game On
programme.desc: Tia invites her friends over for some alfresco finger foods! On the menu: Teriyaki Grilled Steak Skewers with Chili Herb Dipping Sauce, BLT Salad Bites, Hot Potato Tots with Chipotle Ketchup, and Tomato Pop Micheladas.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Dine and Dish
programme.desc: Cory offers to watch Cree for the night so Tia and her friend, Kelly Rowland, can enjoy a girls' night in. Kelly lends Tia a hand to prepare chicken katsu with spicy apple slaw; cauliflower fried rice, sesame noodles with veggies and spiked green tea.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Breakfast in Bed
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is preparing a 'breakfast in bed' style brunch. Bobby wines and dines in bed with an indulgent menu of baked eggs with prosciutto, candied tomatoes and herb parmesan cream, and chocolate covered berries.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Wake Up Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby's coffee-inspired creations include Scrambled Eggs with Sweet Potato Biscuits, Ham Steak & Red Eye Gravy, and Espresso-Chocolate Chip Banana Bread with Espresso.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Impress Your Guests
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay demonstrates how to prepare a jaw-dropping brunch without breaking a sweat.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch on the Go

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Say Cheese
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay knows that cheese makes everything better, and brunch is no exception. He serves up some cheese-filled dishes like Meyer lemon ricotta crepes with candied almonds, a frittata with thyme roasted potatoes, smoked mozzarella and tomato-basil.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: A French Countryside Picnic
programme.desc: Bobby Flay's in the mood for a brunch-style picnic in the style of the French countryside.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Big Apple Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay takes a little inspiration from his hometown to create a versatile and delicious 'Big Apple' brunch. His apple-themed menu features irresistible apple cider donuts, apple sauce parfaits with yogurt and crispy quinoa, and eggs benedict.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Tasty Trattoria Brunch

programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: One Good Scare Ought to Do It!
programme.desc: When Isabella is inflicted with an extreme case of hiccups, the boys attempt to scare them out of her by creating an ominous haunted house full of shocking surprises and thrilling twists and turns.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: That's the Spirit!/ The Curse of Candace
programme.desc: It's Halloween night and the kids encounter a strange boy and his father who are convinced their house is haunted. Then, Candace is bitten by a bat after watching a popular vampire movie and worries that she is becoming a vampire.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Night of the Living Pharmacists
programme.desc: Doofenshmirtz's latest '-inator' accidentally turns the citizens of Danville into contagious Doof-zombies who run rampant all over town. Agent P and the kids must work together to save Danville and avoid becoming Doof-zombies themselves.

programme.title: Movie: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Dracula becomes overprotective of his daughter when a young boy falls for her.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Sleepwalkin'
programme.desc: When Goofy reveals that he's been having trouble with sleepwalking, Mickey agrees to watch over him.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Enter the Nosepicker/ Hide and Shriek
programme.desc: Mavis accidentally lures a Nose Picker into the hotel. Later, Mavis finds her childhood toy, Demented Debbie, in the attic.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Bad Friday/ Hoop Screams
programme.desc: The monsters celebrate bad Friday by trying to win the Screamie for the best scare. Mavis gives Hank the gift of basketball.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Buggin' Out/ How Do You Solve a Problem Like Medusa
programme.desc: While doing her chores around the hotel, Mavis mistakes truth bugs for bed bugs. Mavis invites Lydia's high school rival to the hotel.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Adventures in Vampiresitting/ Phlegm Ball
programme.desc: The kids get trapped in a human house. Mavis' cousin shows up and challenges her to a game of phlegm ball.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Wendy Big and Tall/ Doppelfanger
programme.desc: Mavis accidentally turns Wendy into a ginormous, blobby version of her little self. Mavis' teen crush, Jett Black, visits the hotel.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Great Eggspectations/ Hotel Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Mavis tries to prove she can care for a living creature by rescuing a 'bad egg.' The kids try to watch the last episode of their favourite show, Hotel Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Breakfast at Lydia's/ The Trouble With Wendys
programme.desc: Mavis wins employee of the month and the right to share breakfast with Aunt Lydia. Later, Dr. Gillman saves Wendy's ponytail and now she's indebted to him.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Frankenstunt/ What About Blob
programme.desc: Hank has to pretend to be his dad as he films his new action flick. Mavis and Wendy set up Aunt Lydia and Bob Blob on a date.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Curse Club/ Casket if you Can
programme.desc: Pedro desperately tries to throw a curse. Mavis loses a casket with Aunt Lydia resting inside.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: A Scare to Remember/ Hank and the Real Boy
programme.desc: Aunt Lydia's favourite author is coming to the hotel. The kids cleaned their room so fast, they accidentally got rid of the real ghost writer.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Wrapture/ Becoming Klaus
programme.desc: Mavis needs to quickly replace Pedro's mummy wraps, which were accidently destroyed. A random selection, however, proves problematic as Pedro's personality is transformed. Mavis needs a fang transplant and her cousin Klaus offers to help.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: 116 Candles/ Stop or My Mummy Will Shout
programme.desc: Mavis accidentally turns Aunt Lydia into a teenager.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Legend of Pumpkin Guts
programme.desc: Mavis is determined to break out of lockdown on Halloween.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Top Wing/ Fried Mean Tomatoes
programme.desc: Mavis and Quasimodo host some cooking classes at the hotel, but things don't go quiet as planned. Wendy wants to join the aerial security team, the Night Warts, but tensions arise when Mavis makes the team instead.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Bonds of Earth
programme.desc: Learn how a soccer ball from astronaut Ellison Onizuka’s daughter’s teammates at a high school in Clear Lake, Texas, survived the tragic Challenger space shuttle explosion in January 1986 and finally completed its mission to space 31 years later.

programme.title: The Closer: Products of Discovery
programme.desc: When Brenda's squad investigates the quadruple murder of a family, she accidentally stumbles into the middle of an FBI investigation that may have been a factor in the homicide.

programme.desc: Sgt. Gabriel shoots a murder suspect he is certain is armed and firing at him, but the evidence doesn't seem to match up. A Force Investigator is sent in to check things out, interfering with Brenda's murder investigation.

programme.title: Movie: Twelve Wishes for Christmas

programme.title: Movie: Kristin's Christmas Past
programme.desc: A woman goes to sleep on Christmas Eve and wakes up Christmas morning seventeen years into her past to relive the worst Christmas of her life. She gets a chance to change her imperfect past and her less than perfect future.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Finding Escobar's Millions: What's In The Box?
programme.desc: Former DEA agents break open a mysterious concrete box at a secret narco airstrip and dig for millions at a remote safehouse frequented by Pablo Escobar.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Soviet Doomsday Device

programme.desc: Explore what happened to a cutting-edge research complex built by a visionary genius, an ambitious Nazi project that met a sinister end, and a Cold War relic that changed history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Phantoms of Chernobyl

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.desc: In a race against winter, Shawn extends his sluice to get more gold; Ken pushes the Myrtle 24 hours a day; Emily tangles with the tide; Kris battles a bed of quartz and George enjoys a season-ending dive with his son.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: King of Nome

programme.title: The First 48: Fool for Love/ Dumped
programme.desc: Detectives delve into a victim's past, leading them on a trail lined with love and deceit. A detective and his team scramble for leads after a dead body is mysteriously dumped in an empty field.

programme.title: The First 48: Southwick/ Devil's Doorway
programme.desc: Louisville detectives discover their murder victims have matching tattoos and that a missing friend of the deceased may be a third victim. A man is gunned down in a doorway, and the suspects claim it was self-defence.

programme.title: The First 48: 6,000 Motives/ Deadly Gamble
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the brutal stabbing death of an elderly man in his home, and also investigate the murder of a woman shot during a robbery of her illegal game room.

programme.title: The First 48: House of Pain/ Into the Night
programme.desc: A friendly house party turns into a double murder. Also, a hardworking father stops for a drink after work and is the victim of a robbery gone bad.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents: Homicide Squad Atlanta: Fallen Angel
programme.desc: After a teenager is found murdered in a city park, rookie detective Andre Lowe must find the truth behind the crime. The Homicide Unit and the public, the team scour over possible leads. The victim's car is found miles away, complicating things.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents: Homicide Squad Atlanta: The Dark Staircase
programme.desc: Detective Jamael Logan investigates the brutal murder of a young woman found beaten and shot to death in an Atlanta shopping center.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents: Homicide Squad Atlanta: The Jealous Kind
programme.desc: After an intense interrogation, Detective Logan finally gets his suspect to confess to brutally murdering Misha Moore over eight dollars. A 16-year-old out on a double date gets caught in a shootout with the other woman's jealous boyfriend.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents: Homicide Squad Atlanta: Secrets & Lies
programme.desc: New leads emerge in the Fallen Angel case, and in the heart of Atlanta's wealthiest neighborhood, a man is brutally beaten and shot to death.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents: Homicide Squad Atlanta: Hot Sun, Cold Blood
programme.desc: Detective Zimbrick gets a DNA match on a 16-year old cold case. He and Quinn head to San Francisco where the suspect is incarcerated and get a series of extraordinary lucky breaks along the way.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents: Homicide Squad Atlanta: The Cooler
programme.desc: A DNA hit in the Bridget Shiel murder investigation identifies a compelling new suspect who was recently imprisoned for a double homicide--Christopher Spencer.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Find out if any of the Jokers are avid skiers, and how the maître d' helped when seating patrons. Also, learn why Joe had a hard time escaping the giant cake.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers killed the idea of Joe going shirtless in the boxing ring, and which of the Jokers loves dancing but is no good at it.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Find out which two Jokers know how to practice transcendental meditation and which boy band member the guys met at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: The styles of dance Murr claims to be skilled in. The Joker that recently became a published author.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vegan Plant
programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: While working in a cheese store, Michael milks the reaction of a woman stunned by breeding brie. Later, Michael nails down the perfect app in a salon and unpacks a trick in an airport that ruffles his assistant's feathers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Italian Food Matter
programme.desc: Michael uncovers ancient secrets at an Asian gift shop, reveals a transformative spray at Eataly and leaves his assistant speechless at a photo shoot.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: You've Been Marked
programme.desc: Michael shows off a seashell from the seashore that still has the seashore in it and reveals desserts that break the mold. Plus, at a farm, Michael startles his assistant with a trick that's 'out-of-this-world.'

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science
programme.desc: Michael sweetens a woman's day at a candy store when a chocolate bunny eats her ring, and at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, he inflates pretzels at a snack stand. Plus, one of Michael's tricks gets flushed down the tubes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fright at the Museum
programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the 'call of nature.' Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Impractically Carbonaro Jokers Effect
programme.desc: Four very impractical assistants invade a coffee bar to help Michael stun customers, but they quickly discover the joke is on them.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: A Similar Rock Energy
programme.desc: Michael is back in Chicago hashing out new ideas at a hemp store, inspecting spooky churches and teaming up with special guest star, Jack Black.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Double Dinners
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has a half-empty nest while her daughters are off at college, but she still needs good, hearty food at her fingertips for her hungry teenage sons. So she's cooking up dishes that she can serve half now and freeze the rest for another time.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Concert With Friends
programme.desc: Trisha treats her amazing backup singers to a night out and a picnic-friendly menu of spicy black eyed pea salad, jerk chicken with tropical chutney, spiced plantain chip with mint garlic sauce and mango lime spritzers before a surprise John Legend show.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Barbie
programme.desc: Trisha and Beth make a barbecue feast while reminiscing about their days playing with Barbies.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha Goes to Boot Camp
programme.desc: Trisha and her friend, Natalie, suit up for boot camp. Afterwards, they whip up a menu low on calories but high on flavor, including kale chips, lemon orzo chicken soup, chickpea salad sandwiches and an angel food cake with grapefruit compote.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Mexican Fiesta
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites her friends to a fun afternoon Mexican fiesta. She puts her spin on Mexican classics with recipes that include avocado salad, red and green charred salsa, cheater churros and steak fajitas.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: The Eleventh Hour
programme.desc: Ree's throwing a cocktail bash for the crew helping to open her store in town. There's a delicious line up of make-ahead portable canapes on the menu.

programme.title: Chopped Junior: Cookie Jar Spar

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Into the Darkness
programme.desc: Day one of darkness has arrived in the refuge. Heimo's golden rule to never get caught miles from home in the dark is in jeopardy. The Lewis Family prepares for a life changing event as their daughters prepare to leave and head out on their own in town.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Nothing Lasts Forever
programme.desc: As they near the end of winter, the refuge residents look toward the future. Bob trains his pup Ruger to be a hunting dog, while Ray prepares for an empty nest life without his daughters. Heimo's ambitious mind pushes his aging body to the brink.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The End of Darkness
programme.desc: Sunlight finally returns to the refuge. Heimo's stopped in his tracks by -50 degree temperatures. The Seldens make their home in a new cabin. Bob tries to salvage his worst season in 40 years and questions his future.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Arctic Refuge: Homecoming
programme.desc: The families prepare for the long, cold winter ahead. Heimo builds a brand-new cabin, while the Lewises work to restore their first cabin in the bush. As trapping season approaches, the Seldens try to stock up on moose meat.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Arctic Refuge: Fair Game
programme.desc: The families are on the hunt for food in anticipation for the long winter ahead. Tyler and Ashley score big game and bask in the glory of their triumph, while Heimo pursues caribou meat. Ray Lewis sets out on his own search.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Arctic Refuge: Homecoming
programme.desc: The families prepare for the long, cold winter ahead. Heimo builds a brand-new cabin, while the Lewises work to restore their first cabin in the bush. As trapping season approaches, the Seldens try to stock up on moose meat.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Arctic Refuge: Fair Game
programme.desc: The families are on the hunt for food in anticipation for the long winter ahead. Tyler and Ashley score big game and bask in the glory of their triumph, while Heimo pursues caribou meat. Ray Lewis sets out on his own search.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Home Again
programme.desc: With summer fading and trapping season around the corner, Heimo Korth works to build a new cabin for his family. The Seldens settle in and look to fill their larder with moose meat, while the Lewis family attempts to reach an old homestead by boat.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Only the Strong
programme.desc: The countdown to winter continues as Heimo breaks ground on the new cabin. Bob and his daughter embark on a river journey to the cabin where she was raised.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Reptiles of the Lost Continent (Madagascar)
programme.desc: A journey into the forests of Madagascar reveals the varied species of chameleons that have evolved in mysterious ways on this ancient island. Steve locates the smallest and largest of this amazing reptile family.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kittens and Pocket Pets
programme.desc: See the world of puppies and kittens like never before.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Wildcat!
programme.desc: Brian and Carre are overwhelmed and at a loss when they realize they're fostering a wild feral cat. Garret and Jenny have their hands full with Duff: a cat that goes from pleasant to vicious with zero warning.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: The birth of a little blue penguin becomes causes a sensation at the Bronx Zoo. The veterinary team scrambles to figure out what is wrong with Snowball, a snow leopard. And the exhibits team designs an exhibit for the newly arrived blue iguana.

programme.title: The Zoo: Miracle Cub
programme.desc: The ingenuity of zoo staff is put to the test as they devise a treatment for a newborn snow leopard cub struggling to walk and a group of surprisingly adorable Rodrigues fruit bats are trained for a big move.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Warthog Named Peaches

programme.desc: Bart is rescued from a confrontation with Springfield Elementary's bullies by Diggs, a recent transfer student and aspiring champion in the niche sport of falconry. But, Bart soon discovers that Diggs wants to do more than just wrangle falcons.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Man Who Grew Too Much
programme.desc: On a research trip, Lisa is shocked to discover that Sideshow Bob is now the chief scientist at a massive chemical engineering company, but her fears are allayed as she becomes enamoured with his likeminded appreciation of high-culture.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Winter of His Content
programme.desc: Marge invites Grampa and two other octogenarians to live at the Simpsons’ house after the Retirement Castle is closed for health violations, but she quickly becomes frustrated with Homer when he starts embracing the 'old person lifestyle.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: The War of Art
programme.desc: After Lisa's new pet guinea pig destroys the Simpsons' living room art, Marge falls in love with a beautiful painting at the Van Houten's yard sale that Homer snaps up for $20.

programme.title: The Simpsons: You Don't Have to Live Like a Referee
programme.desc: Homer is recruited as a World Cup referee after Lisa extols his integrity on the youth soccer field in a Springfield Elementary speech contest. But when the Simpsons travel to Brazil, Homer finds his honesty tested by a gangster in the bribing business.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Luca$
programme.desc: Marge is concerned that Lisa is dating below her station when she brings home competitive-eater-in-training Lucas Bortner, and she enlists Homer to help Lisa explore other options.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Days of Future Future
programme.desc: Set in the future, Homer has a new clone for every time he dies. Lisa is married to a zombie version of Milhouse, while Bart deals with custody issues with his ex-wife, Jenda. Each defines what love means to them.

programme.title: The Simpsons: What to Expect When Bart's Expecting
programme.desc: Bart can't stand art class, so he makes a voodoo doll of his art teacher. But when his spell makes her pregnant instead, he becomes a saviour to Springfield couples trying to conceive. Then, he's kidnapped to help conceive a thoroughbred racehorse.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Mac and Charlie Die

programme.desc: Charlie and Frank engage in an argument over who exactly pooped the bed. Dennis and Mac stage an overnight viewing to determine the culprit.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Paddy's Pub: The Worst Bar in Philadelphia
programme.desc: After he publishes a scathing review of Paddy's, the gang kidnaps a restaurant reviewer in order to change his mind. Charlie accidentally kidnaps the writer's neighbour.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Dennis Reynolds: An Erotic Life
programme.desc: Mac and Frank discover Dennis' erotic memoirs and try to profit off the masterpiece. Dee and Charlie swap lives for a day.

programme.title: Wild Costa Rica
programme.desc: See how the wealth of creatures in Costa Rica flourishes despite the constant threat of danger. See how these creatures sustain and survive on both land and sea.

programme.title: Mexico Untamed: The Quick and the Dead
programme.desc: The diversity in Mexico breeds fierce competition leading to a wild battle for dominance.

programme.title: Mexico Untamed: Live Another Day
programme.desc: The animals of Mexico endlessly struggle to provide for a new generation.

programme.title: Brazil: Jewels of the Jungle

programme.title: Brazil: The Jaguar's Lair
programme.desc: The Pantanal switches from grassland to swamp and back each year with the seasonal rains; it is one of the most dramatic changes of any habitat on earth. Meet the jaguars that rule this beautiful and bizarre world.

programme.title: Brazil: Shadow of the Eagle
programme.desc: The largest rain forest in the world still holds many secrets.

programme.title: Amazonia: Waterworld
programme.desc: Aquatic and terrestrial worlds must coexist in the world's mightiest river.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Journey to Saturn's Rings
programme.desc: New discoveries are changing everything we know about Saturn's rings, revealing that they're newer and more mysterious than we ever imagined, and that some day soon, they might disappear forever.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Search for Alien Earths
programme.desc: Astronomers and researchers are on the hunt for the groundbreaking discovery that confirms extraterrestrial life. Using state-of-the-art technology like the Kepler telescope, scientists examine thousands of exoplanets in search of another Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Planets From Hell
programme.desc: Over the last twenty years we have discovered an extraordinary zoo of planetary nightmares outside our own solar system, all of them truly wild worlds, a collection of monsters. Discussing if all new planets are planets from hell.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Explore the inner workings of outer space and how the earth was created.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret World of Nebulas
programme.desc: Nebulas are the strange structures of cosmic gas and dust where stars are born and die, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strange Lives of Dwarf Planets
programme.desc: Our solar system is home to hundreds of strange, tiny worlds called dwarf planets, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Planet 9
programme.desc: Scientists have discovered a mysterious ninth planet on the very edge of our solar system. Ten times the size of Earth, this strange world could have moons with extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret World of Nebulas
programme.desc: Nebulas are the strange structures of cosmic gas and dust where stars are born and die, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of Pluto
programme.desc: The first close-up images of Pluto revealed the unimaginable secrets of this mysterious frozen world. Now, scientists investigate if Pluto is home to a warm ocean of liquid water beneath its surface, and whether this underground ocean could harbor life.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Wrath of the Sun
programme.desc: Experts are uncovering the deadly secrets of our solar system's star, and revealing the apocalyptic threat it could possibly present to life on Earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Dark Origins of the Moon
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that everything we know about our moon could be wrong, and now, investigators are racing to understand the mysteries of its dark and violent past.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of the Voyager Mission
programme.desc: Voyager has had a profound effect on our knowledge of the cosmos. Its mission was supposed to last five years but remains ongoing, changing our understanding of the solar system. With contributions from key scientists, we explore what happens next.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Mystery of the Alien Asteroid
programme.desc: When a strange alien object is discovered speeding through the solar system, experts race to uncover if it's real evidence of extraterrestrial contact, or a deadly asteroid on a collision course with planet earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Rise of the Red Planet
programme.desc: The latest science reveals what it would take to build colonies on Mars, and how our future on the Red Planet might be closer than we think.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Osiris

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Vampire Down Under

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Mayan Treasure

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freak of the Deep
