programme.title: 48 Hours: Trail of Tears
programme.desc: A couple's mountain hike turns into a tragedy and the woman's boyfriend is charged with her murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Unknown Child
programme.desc: A girl is found murdered in a California restaurant parking lot. A tenacious investigator, a forensic sculptor and a report by 48 HOURS would help break the case. But identifying the girl was the first step. Would her killer be found? Harold Dow reports.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Wounded by Love
programme.desc: A lover is shot dead and a police recorded cell phone video may not be enough to clear or convict the man's girlfriend.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Father and Son
programme.desc: From the start a man maintained the death of his ex-wife was a suicide but to her son it was always murder and he was determined to have his father face a jury of his peers.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Death by Design
programme.desc: A couple's fight reaches a tragic end when one of them is shot. A tape recorder that's captured final words becomes evidence in a murder trial. When more tapes are found, the jury must examine a violent history and decide the fate of a possible murderer.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: A mother is gunned down next to her toddler, sparking a homicide investigation involving passion, kidnapping and intimidation. When cops discover a dictatphone, it leads them on the trail of intimate audio recordings that could prove reveal her killer.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: The Sound of Terror
programme.desc: In 1983, the Secret Service are on the trail of a counterfeiter. In a storage unit, they find sickening audio recordings of him torturing dozens of women. Analyzing the tapes, they realize that he may be one of the most depraved serial killers in history.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: In the Lion's Cage
programme.desc: Linda Wittmier and Terry Jo Howard both fell in love with James Michael Randall. And both suffered when they discovered the monster that lurked inside him. But they never realized how lucky they were to survive his twisted sexual desire to kill.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Air Aces: Red Tails
programme.desc: Pressure from African-American activist groups pushed President Roosevelt to initiate a Blacks-only fighter pilot training program during WWII.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: Air Aces: George Beurling
programme.desc: Canadian George Beurling broke every rule in the book yet became one of the greatest fighter pilots of World War II.

programme.title: Air Aces: Douglas Bader
programme.desc: In July 1940, Britain's most celebrated air ace, Douglas Bader, and his ragtag squadron of Canadian fighter pilots, went into battle against Hitler's mighty Luftwaffe.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Warriors on the Frontlines
programme.desc: During the Vietnam War, Drew Dix and a small handful of soldiers liberate an entire city from an enemy battalion. Russian soldier Viktor Leonov vanquishes German forces in the Arctic battlegrounds of World War 2.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Vices and Vacations
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we explore the myths surrounding our favorite vices and learn the facts behind some of our favorite holidays.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: French investigators hunt down Paul Touvier, a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters. This 'Hangman of Lyon' hid himself with the assistance of a right wing group associated with the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dilapidated Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle a 1930s dilapidated island cabin with major rot issues. They have a budget of $30,000 and six weeks to complete the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Clearwater Camp
programme.desc: The team take on a cabin in Industry, ME, that hasn't been touched since the 1970's. Loads of issues arise once the snow melts and they start digging in.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Camp on Two Ponds
programme.desc: Chase and his team of Maine builders have been called in to renovate a camp uniquely located on two ponds. With winter right around the corner, Chase knows they need to hustle in order to complete the renovation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dated Cabin Turned Retreat
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a dated and dysfunctional cabin in Belgrade Lakes, one of Maine's most desirable regions. They try to turn the cabin into the perfect family retreat with a budget of $40,000 and six weeks.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain Gear Is Going On
programme.desc: Chappie's team struggles to lift 600-pound rafters onto the cabin's roof. Then, Chris works on drying in his cabin while Jeff begins installing his cabin's windows.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Game Changer
programme.desc: Jeff struggles with his front deck. Chappie's team finds a major error while building the exterior insulation and Chris Sewell runs out of building materials.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Toy Set For Big Kids
programme.desc: Chris gets some much needed help from family to work on his interior. A floatplane with engine problems brings Chappie's build site to a standstill and Jeff makes a critical error while building the water tank system for his cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Knock This Thing Out
programme.desc: As winter barrels down on Alaska, the builders scramble to complete their heating systems. Chappie must climb an extremely tall ladder to cut a hole in his roof while Jeff and his friend Andy build a hearth and Chris fixes a leak in his chimney.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: As the final days of their builds approach, the builders work to complete their cabins. Jeff Erickson helicopters in the remaining furniture for his cabin, and Chris Sewell's team works hard through the night to get the interior floors installed.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Shaky Ground
programme.desc: Three new build teams arrive to their build sites and begin work on their unique cabins in the remote Alaskan wilderness. Josh Tousignant and his crew make the long trip to Cordova to begin building the foundation for their clients' two-story cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Anything Can Go Wrong
programme.desc: At Trinity Lake, Chris and Joe battle an 80-foot spruce that begins to fall too soon before a helicopter delivery almost goes wrong. John and Heather fall behind while building the floor of their cabin due to the rain and need to get back to schedule.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Moving on to Plan X-Ray
programme.desc: Josh and his team begin work on the interior walls and install the second-story floor joists in their Cordova cabin. At Trinity Lake, Chris must adapt when he runs out of lumber to build a dock and the framers he hired don't show up.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Up High Without a Net
programme.desc: Chris Maynard and team prepare for two intense helicopter deliveries of roof rafters and Greg precariously scales a raised rake wall to nail it into place. John and Heather are finishing the roof by installing insulation and metal sheeting.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Playing Catch Up
programme.desc: All three builds are running behind schedule and must rush to get ahead. John and Heather build a water catchment system but discover they aren't getting enough water pressure, Chris Maynard's windows are delivered by helicopter in strong winds.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Hunt County Fair in Greenville, Texas, and makes short work of the Smoke Bomb and the French toast crunch burger. But it's the blue bacon cheesecake that really knocks him out.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Daytona Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Casey's delicious mission brings him to Daytona Beach, Florida, where he takes on a mammoth three-tier sandwich stacked with two burgers, six pieces of Mahi Mahi, two pieces of Texas toast and a ten-ounce bun.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Fried Favorites
programme.desc: Fire up the fryer for the crispiest and crunchiest dishes this country has to offer, from gravy-smothered French fries in Cleveland, Ohio, to tempura-battered bacon in New York City.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Game Day Grub

programme.title: Movie: The Hate U Give
programme.desc: Teenager Starr lives two lives, her home one in a poor and mostly black neighbourhood, and her school life at a rich, mostly white prep school. When she witnesses her friend get fatally shot by a police officer, she becomes torn between her two lives.

programme.title: Movie: Kin

programme.title: Movie: A Golden Christmas
programme.desc: Two long-lost friends reconnect during Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: The Santa Con
programme.desc: A small-time con man is ordered to take a job as a department store Santa during the holidays. Near the end of his first shift, he promises a young boy Santa will bring his estranged parents back together.

programme.title: Movie: Love at the Christmas Table
programme.desc: Two friends who have spent every Christmas together at the children's table realize they are meant to be together.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch
programme.desc: A case where a fingerprint left in a piece of cloth brought justice to a senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror

programme.desc: Shawn's rival Ken unleashes his 600-ton gold gobbler while Shawn fights to keep a family dynasty. Vernon makes a valiant return in an attempt to strike it rich with a new dredge. Emily fights to reclaims her hotspot.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: An epic Clash of Titans grips the gold mining fleet as Shawn constructs the largest washplant in Nome and Ken's mining monster roars to life. Vern prospects using his new innovations. Ripping currents threaten the Kellys.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: The Sound of Money
programme.desc: Enhanced episodes of Bering Sea Gold: Under the Ice.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Storm Ravaged
programme.desc: Whipping winds and crashing waves force the miners to ask themselves how hard they're willing to fight. Shawn channels his inner MacGyver to fix a stalled machine. Kris acts boldly. Vern must make a life or death decision.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Crisis in the Klondike
programme.desc: Enhanced episodes of 'Gold Rush' featuring extra facts, tweets and behind-the-scenes.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Crash Course
programme.desc: Dangers rise with the tide when Shawn has a mishap underwater and Emily faces a possible collision. George prospects for brother Dave and Ken Kerr and the Kellys take home a chunk of gold.

programme.title: Alaska: Most Extreme
programme.desc: Alaska is bigger, badder, stronger and more dangerously unpredictable than any other place in the nation. With America's highest mountains, most powerful earthquakes, fiercest wildlife, biggest waves, and cruellest winters, it is raw unbridled nature.

programme.title: Raw Alaska
programme.desc: An avalanche swallows a skier wearing a helmet camera. A rogue buffalo crushes a man.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Roaring Back To Life
programme.desc: As the winter ice thaws, Idaho's River of No Return flows, and the people living on its violent shores navigate the raging spring rapids. The small community hustles to work, so they can survive another season in this rugged and dangerous backcountry.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Bearing Down on the Ranch
programme.desc: A predatory bear stalks a homestead forcing the rancher to aggressively protect himself and his cattle. A jetboat engine failure in the river rapids puts Buck's operation in jeopardy. A violent storm forces bush pilots to make an emergency landing.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Lost Tomb of Attila the Hun

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Africa's Cursed Lake of Gold

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Search for Florida's Lost Pirate

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Browbeaten

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Water Torture
programme.desc: The guys spin a wheel and creep out shoppers at the mall. And tonight's punishment leaves one Joker soaked, enraged, and totally shocked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: A world class roster of diverse wrestlers give fans a new wrestling experience.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins College
programme.desc: Adam shares why becoming a dropout billionaire is unlikely and how school rankings have little to do with education quality. Plus, student loans.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Economy

programme.desc: When Valerie Bertinelli's husband's cousins come to town, she is challenged with converting cousin Mary's favorite Italian recipes into healthier versions, so that Mary can still indulge while staying on a heart-healthy regimen.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Say Yes to the Veg
programme.desc: Valerie is testing ways to get veggies into recipes for kids. Her producer's two grandsons drop by for mac and cheese with hidden cauliflower, jazzed up sweet potato fries, spinach and red pepper stuffed chicken and zucchini and ginger naked cake.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Valerie to the Rescue
programme.desc: Valerie's friend injures himself snowboarding; she brings him the perfect scratch-made supper he can enjoy at home.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Oh, Baby
programme.desc: There's a new baby on the ranch, so Ree Drummond is taking a trip down memory lane and preparing a new-mom care package full of dishes she was given and plenty of pampering goodies. She includes her friend Beth's brisket, as well as funeral potatoes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Man Cave
programme.desc: The boys and their friends are making a man cave on the ranch and Ree is feeding them during the remodelling. There are chicken bacon ranch paninis for lunch, then steak fingers with gravy with mini chopped salad and brownies for dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Triple D Takes On Triple G ... Again!
programme.desc: Creating the ultimate diner dish should be easy for Triple D chefs, but a strict weight limit on ingredients makes this challenge heavy duty. Then, who has time to figure out what Guy's favorite dish is when you only get a few minutes to shop.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: When Guy Gives You Lemon Bars ...

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Rising Stars

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Small Town Troubles
programme.desc: Game wardens are ready for springtime in Texas. Wardens investigate a video of an illegal hunter. A concerned citizen reports a hunter on his property. A fisherman is illegally catching oysters. A game warden smells something fishy going on.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Chase on the Border
programme.desc: When the Texas Game Wardens encounter a sick bald eagle, it becomes a race against time to ensure its survival.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Turkey Trouble

programme.title: North Woods Law: Spring Training
programme.desc: Officer Lucas sends a trainee to wrangle his first angry raccoon. Officer Fluette untangles a trapper's web of lies. Officer Benvenuti tries to rescue an injured gosling. Officers Boudreau and Hannett question father and son turkey hunters.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Captured on Camera

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Ready to Roll

programme.title: The Zoo: The Kings of Queens

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Courtship of the Jaguars

programme.desc: Kelly is shocked to learn how the allegation from last year's reunion has affected her daughter Jolie. Emily hosts her in-laws to celebrate their birthdays without the help of her husband Shane. Brauwnyn and Sean spend Valentine's day in their love shack.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: All Aboard the Rumor Train
programme.desc: As Tamra's housewarming party continues, Kelly's tear-filled exit prompts the other women to air their grievances. Gina confesses a painful secret to Emily. Shannon and Braunwyn cement their friendship and bond over challenges they face parenting.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Breakdown in Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Kelly and Brauwnyn watch Emily rehearse her anniversary dance number for an upcoming Vegas trip, which may turn into a girls' trip instead of the anniversary celebration she hoped for. Shannon plans a group day trip to so Gina can visit Rodeo Drive.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Liar, Liar, Friendships on Fire
programme.desc: The day trip to Beverly Hills continues and Shannon surprises the group with tourist clothes and a double decker bus ride through Hollywood. Tamra confronts Braunwyn about going behind her back and secretly communicating with her enemies.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Family Affair
programme.desc: Emily is threatened by Gina's growing friendship with Shannon. Tamra and Shannon coach Vicki on how to deal with Kelly on their upcoming trip to Arizona. Kelly deals with family issues as her brother JR encourages her to fix her estranged relationships.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Dance Like No One Is Watching
programme.desc: Kelly invests in a new business and goes to a wellness expo to practice her pitch. While Gina meets with a new lawyer about her DUI, Braunwyn and Kelly head to Las Vegas to support Emily at her dance performance.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Let's Get Metaphysical

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Miracle at Miraval
programme.desc: The Miraval trip continues as Vicki unleashes another rumor about Kelly, leading Kelly to explode at the 'tres amigas.' Everyone goes beekeeping, except Kelly, who stays behind. An emotional dinner discussion leads to an unlikely apology.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Big O's and Broken Toes
programme.desc: Gina's double date with Shane's cousin is canceled due to a broken toe. Emily goes to Tamra and Eddie for help to lose weight and learns the situation is more extreme than she thought. Shannon gets an O shot. Brauwyn has a family photo shoot.

programme.title: Car Issues: The Lambo and the Bronco

programme.desc: Tyler finds best of both worlds, the guts of a Grand National with the plush interior or a Regal Turbo. He decides to race it against modern Regal Turbo to see if things have gotten better or worse with age.

programme.title: Car Issues: El Camino/ Jaguar XJ6
programme.desc: Tyler finds one of his bucket list cars, a 1975 Chevy El Camino. Later, he buys a cherry red 1971 Jaguar XJ6 with a Chevy 350 engine swapped in.

programme.title: Car Issues: Somebody Call 944/ Lightning in the Throttle
programme.desc: Tyler finds a 1986 Porsche 944 Turbo in what looks close to mint condition, but the car apparently has an axle to grind. He also finds a great deal on a supercharged pickup truck made famous by 'The Fast and the Furious.'

programme.title: Car Issues: Benz With Benefits/ Home on the Range
programme.desc: Tyler finds a ridiculously fast, RENNTECH tuned Mercedes CL600. On his next trip in Colorado, he picks up a Range Rover for a suspiciously low asking price. He decides to find out what it's got left in it and drives straight up side of mountain.

programme.title: Car Issues: The Magnum and the Viper
programme.desc: Tyler finds a 2006 Dodge Magnum SRT and later picks up a 1995 Dodge Viper which breaks before he even has a chance to buy it.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Chumlee's Challenge
programme.desc: Chumlee from Gold and Silver stops by to pick up his custom 1963 Lincoln, but gets some really bad news instead. Later, a casino VIP commissions a bike inspired by the largest chunk of gold in the world.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Car Hoarder
programme.desc: Danny can't stop buying cars and ends up in an extremely heated roadside bidding war.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Pimpmobile
programme.desc: The shop finally gets to work on Danny's famous '71 Super Fly Cadillac, but Kevin isn't feeling the love. Later, Grandpa wins big at poker, but blows a deal for a new motorcycle.

programme.desc: New York City's biggest construction project involves an army of ambitious engineers and builders tasked with developing seven city blocks over 24-hour subway trains in Manhattan's Hudson Yards.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: World's Biggest Cruise Ship
programme.desc: Go inside the largest cruise ship on the planet: a massive ship that's 1,181 feet long and weighs a staggering 227,000 tons.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Chernobyl's Toughest Fix
programme.desc: The Chernobyl disaster created one of the world's deadliest places, and as the temporary fix around the damaged reactor begins to fail, engineers race to build a cutting-edge structure to contain the contamination that could threaten the world.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Monster Train
programme.desc: One of the largest trains in the world, the SD70 locomotive leads a 1.6-mile-long monster hauling 24,000 tons of iron ore through the wilderness.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Goliath of the Outback
programme.desc: The Mack Superliner is a record-breaking monster truck that can haul huge loads across the dangerous dirt roads of the Australian Outback.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Rise of the Bullet Train
programme.desc: Japan's bullet trains are some of the fastest in the world, and its cutting-edge engineering moves 150 million people every year with extraordinary speed and efficiency.

programme.title: Female Forces: Ready to Rumble

programme.title: American Justice: Cops on Trial
programme.desc: Police officers and the general public are held to different standards of justice.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Police officers Robb and Bethany find themselves in an armed standoff with a suspect who has holed up in an apartment complex. Meanwhile, Fire Rescue team Mayville and Stokes must put out a trailer fire that threatens to incinerate the rest of the park.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: Two innocent teenage girls are targeted by obsessed stalkers. One manages to survive, and after police raid her stalker's home, he's sent to prison. The other had no idea she had a stalker until he killed her, then himself.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: A man takes cyber-stalking to a whole new level by sending hundreds of threatening messages and posting over 40 videos on social media that document his twisted fixation for a former high school classmate.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: A woman scared to death by a stalker is relieved when he disappears for a few years--only to make a terrifying return.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams: Robert Blake
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams take a new look at the unsolved murder of actor Robert Blake's wife, Bonnie Lee Bakely.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Robert Blake
programme.desc: Marcia Clark attempts to uncover the truth behind the unsolved murder of actor Robert Blake's wife, Bonnie Lee Bakley. Determined to find Bakley’s killer, Marcia scrutinizes this twisted Hollywood tale to separate the facts from the fiction.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our House of Horrors
programme.desc: Alice Swanson was always envious of the perfect life her childhood neighbor, William Jennings Choyce, and his family seemed to have. But after she married him, she slowly realized that nothing under the surface was as perfect as it seemed.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Son's Prisoner
programme.desc: Shelly Lietz had been afraid of her son ever since he was four years old. She knew she saw something evil in his eyes that scared her. As he got older and more violent, that fear crippled her, eventually making her a prisoner in her own home.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Face of My Torturer
programme.desc: William Knorr's mother, Theresa, always threatened that if she ever went to jail for what she had done, she would take him down with her. After years spent helping her keep the horrors secret, could he ever escape or would he wind up like all the others?

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our Secret Identity
programme.desc: As a child, Pam Jacobs spent years of her life on the run from the law. But she had no idea that her father, Charles Sinclair, was a wanted man until the day the FBI caught up with them.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: Deadly Dynamics
programme.desc: A brutal murder is committed in front of the Hattenbrun home, and police must focus on several family members to catch the sadistic killer. Before long, they discover a shocking truth that no one thought possible.

programme.title: A Killing in Kendrick
programme.desc: Kendrick, Idaho, hidden away in the mountains, is the perfect place for Donna Fontaine to retire and dream of a quieter life. But Donna's dream comes to a tragic end when her house is burned down and she and her boyfriend are found shot dead inside.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Two can keep a secret, if one of them is dead. These Deadly Women think they've committed the perfect murders.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: Deadly Dynamics
programme.desc: A brutal murder is committed in front of the Hattenbrun home, and police must focus on several family members to catch the sadistic killer. Before long, they discover a shocking truth that no one thought possible.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hit and Run

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our Secret Identity
programme.desc: As a child, Pam Jacobs spent years of her life on the run from the law. But she had no idea that her father, Charles Sinclair, was a wanted man until the day the FBI caught up with them.

programme.title: American Nightmare: The Answering Machine
programme.desc: When a charitable, up-and-coming actress is savagely murdered in her home, police believe an angry, revenge-hungry killer is responsible. No one could expect the lies, obsessions, and evidence that will be uncovered in this shocking cold case.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: A storm rattles the night in Key Largo, Florida, as an intruder slips silently into the home of newlyweds Michael and Missy MacIvor. As daylight clears away the rain, a nightmare is revealed that will haunt the entire community for years to come.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Robert Henry, an exec in Tacoma, was murdered in 1995 by a masked gunman. His wife tells the Police she thought he was killed by a former business associate. Det. Yerbury investigated and pieced together the evidence that convicted Larry Shandola.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: The Evil Inside
programme.desc: At work, Kerri Harris and her friend discover a camera secreted in the ladies' restroom. Police examine the evidence, but less than 24 hours into their investigation, Kerri is found stabbed to death in her office. Her co-workers are just feet away.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Living a Lie
programme.desc: Bob Peterson invites himself to his co-workers Gene and Jaye-Jaye Thurnau's new home to give them a housewarming present. That evening, Jaye-Jaye leaves the guys to run an errand.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Murder in the Hamptons
programme.desc: Millionaire Ted Ammon was murdered in his Hamptons mansion just days before divorcing his wife, Generosa. She got $80 million, and her boyfriend got 25 years to life.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Party to Die For
programme.desc: Everyone knew that teenager Tyler Hadley's parents were strict. So how was it they were allowing him to throw a blow-out party at their house? Also, Caleb Gordley was a good kid. But when he sneaked out of the house to party, the consequences were deadly.

programme.title: 20/20: Footprints in the Snow
programme.desc: Two teenage sisters disappear amid their parents' bitter divorce battle. Their mother denies any involvement, but their father claims she knows more than she's letting on. When the girls turn up nearly three years later, will the truth finally come out?

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Missing or Murdered?
programme.desc: Shelby Wilkie has disappeared. Had she gone off the deep end, stressed by post-partum syndrome? Was she running away from her husband? Or was she murdered? As her family pleas for her return, details emerge of a life that was not all it seemed.

programme.title: Shattered: False Prophet
programme.desc: 1994. Middle River, MD. Christmas Day. A murder rocks a family's Christmas celebration... a mother prepares a holiday dinner for a son who never arrives... and a detective unearths a dark secret that shatters a town's faith.

programme.title: Shattered: The Box
programme.desc: 1996. A father in Texas seeks revenge for the savage dismemberment of his son... a girl in Mississippi desperately tries to escape the metal footlocker she has been imprisoned in... and a rookie detective is assigned a case that will define his career.

programme.title: Shattered: A Very Bad Day
programme.desc: One morning in 1994, a high school student holds his class hostage at gunpoint. As students, teachers and police are faced with impending disaster, they have no idea that the worst of the day's carnage is yet to be discovered.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Dead on Target
programme.desc: A young father-to-be is shot dead in broad daylight by a single bullet fired from afar. At the crime scene, Kenda recognizes the hallmark of a skilled sniper. But with zero evidence at his disposal, he'll rely on shoe leather detective work.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: The husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France. Barbie, known as 'The Butch of Lyon', was responsible for the deaths of 10,000 French Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.desc: Laura Williams is on a mission to build an off-the-grid home in the desert outside of Tucson, Arizona. She builds an earthen three-dome home by hand battling a steep learning curve and Mother Nature.

programme.desc: A neglected, unappealing exterior has kept Bill and Tricia's property on the market for two months. Chris and Sara give the house a fresh colour, improve the exterior layout and add other features to increase the property value.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Tiki Island Oasis
programme.desc: With the help of the native Seminole Indians, host Vanilla Ice and his crew create a one-of-a-kind Tiki island for the mansion. But it's not all fun and games when the inspector shows up for the home inspections.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: VIP Landscaping
programme.desc: Rob and the guys put their landscaping skills to the test by renovating the bombed out yard. From excavating issues to neighbor complaints, Vanilla Ice and his crew have to push through the weeds to turn the yard into a lush environment to relax in.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: The Lakeside Lounge
programme.desc: It's either sink or swim when Vanilla Ice and his crew attempt to put their lakeside property on the map by building aquatic additions that include a boat dock, beach area and an authentic tiki hut.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Modern, Zen Oasis With A Rustic Escape
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team has to turn a sunroom, concrete patio, and dirt landing by the pond into one cohesive space. After tearing out the sunroom, they build a steel framed deck with a flat roof that's connected to the existing patio.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Double Decker Deck With Out-of-the-Box Elements
programme.desc: With a half a million-dollar budget, this deck spares no expense. With features like an elevator, mahogany decking, three skylights, and glass walls and floors.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Spacious Retreat With Artistic Details
programme.desc: The Mega team overhauls an ugly, exposed and downright dangerous deck disaster. They face challenging weather, rotting wood and even an infestation while transforming two separate and unusable spaces into a sprawling, year-round retreat.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Cabin Lookout With a Wrap-Around Porch
programme.desc: Garth is challenged to create a modern, spacious deck while maintaining a log cabin feel. His plan includes redoing their entire wrap-around porch, adding a fire pit, and expanding the main area to become a fully enclosed glass living space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Triple Threat Deck With a Pool
programme.desc: The team builds their biggest and most expensive masterpiece over four months on a $750,000 budget. Big problems start after finishing the deck, when freezing temperatures put an indefinite hold on finishing the pool.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Mountain Retreat with a Rocky View
programme.desc: The team contends with nearly impassable roads, mountain weather and a build site on top a granite boulder.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dream Deck With a Cozy Feel
programme.desc: Garth and the team face a huge challenge transforming a rickety, unsafe deck into a two-story masterpiece with a stone kitchen and bar, fire and water features and a spiral staircase.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Family Fun Deck With Plenty of Features
programme.desc: A 1970s-era sunroom and a small deck are taken down to create one space where a family can cook, eat, entertain, and stay warm. The finished project features a two-sided fireplace, water features, and custom privacy.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Scenic Overlook With a Private Deck
programme.desc: The team plans to create a large enclosed space that homeowners can enjoy throughout the year. As a retaining wall is uncovered, the plans for expansion come into question. They also battle cold, icy terrain and a 25-foot cliff.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Thousand Goodbyes
programme.desc: Flooring takes center stage inside the country house, while outside the barn is finally completed. The river house gets its finishing touches as Mike and MJ prepare to say goodbye to the Thousand Islands.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Holmes Stretch
programme.desc: The first property that Mike Holmes and his son, MJ, bought is the last to be finished. Time is money, and there's still a ton of work to be done before they can put the sign up on the lawn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Families Helping Families
programme.desc: Mike is going back to his roots and helping families, along with his kids, Michael and Sherry. At a home they dub The City Barn, they plan to fix the weathered roof and make the property more accessible for a 13-year-old who is battling cancer.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Structural issues at their two clients' houses means Mike and Michael must split up and tackle the jobs separately. Michael takes on the roof and other problems at The City Barn, while Mike uncovers unsettling complications.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Wilderness Cooking
programme.desc: Roger visits the Jack Mountain Bushcraft School in Masardis, Maine where the owner and wilderness guide Tim Smith teaches him how to create a rustic kitchen outdoors.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Mexican Feast
programme.desc: Roger meets with Chef Johnny Hernandez in San Antonio, Texas and cooks regional Mexican dishes in the ultimate outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Cowboy Cooking
programme.desc: Chicken fried steak over an open fire and peach cobbler in a cast iron skillet.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hog Wild And Shuckling Delicious
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is firing up three different rigs to cook a whole hog, racks of ribs and bushels of oysters for the ultimate South Carolina-style surf and turf.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Bacon
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases the towering BLTs, juicy bacon burgers, pizzas, pies, pancakes and more with the 12 tastiest bacon dishes in America.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Salty and Smoky in the Windy City
programme.desc: Anthony Anderson hooks up with Michael Symon to discover some of the city's legendary food institutions for sensational smoke sausages and indulgent burgers.

programme.title: The Righteous Gemstones

programme.desc: After a horrific attack leaves him broken and with no memories, Mark Hogancamp copes with his painful and confusing life by building a miniature replica of a World War II village, complete with resident dolls that resemble himself and his friends.

programme.title: Movie: Funny Games

programme.desc: A visionary crime-drama set in two different worlds; a club scene and drug trade.
